name: biz-validate
description: Iterate the business case until structure, arithmetic, and claim substantiation are all green.
fixPrompt: Fix the deliverable at {{deliverable.path}} so each failing check passes. required-sections: add the missing section and write its real content. figure-reconciliation: find which savings component or total is wrong and correct the underlying number — do not fudge the total. claim-substantiation: add a [^id] citation or inline (source: …) to any unsupported percentage/superlative claim, or remove the claim. Edit only the business case file.
guardrails: Never invent or fabricate a source to satisfy claim-substantiation — if a claim has no evidence, the claim must change or be removed, not the citation faked.
Never edit the Total line to make a reconcile block balance; correct the component figures so the arithmetic is true.
Never delete a required section to pass the structure check — write the section.
onExhausted: Stop. Report which checks still fail and why the case cannot yet be substantiated (e.g., a baseline metric genuinely lacks a source). Recommend human review.
